hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"REMINDER: If this turn results in any meaningful state change (file edits, new files, commits, branch ops, etc.) — whether from a typed prompt, plan approval, or other directive — update docs/PROMPT_HISTORY.md (clean, readable) and docs/PROMPT_HISTORY_ORIG.md (original wording with inline context clarifications). Redact personal and security-sensitive details."}}'
